name: Dotloop Real Estate Transaction Management API
what_it_does: Dotloop REST API for real estate transaction management and e-signature platform. Enables AI agents to manage real estate transaction loops and document workflows, handle e-signature collection on contracts and disclosures, access MLS listing and offer data, retrieve compliance and audit trail data for brokerage records, manage document templates and clause libraries, integrate with CRM and MLS systems, retrieve transaction milestone and status data, and connect transaction data with accounting and reporting systems.
use_cases: Managing real estate transaction loops and document status from transaction coordination agents
Collecting e-signatures on contracts from workflow automation agents
Accessing compliance and audit trail data from brokerage compliance agents
Integrating transaction data with CRM from real estate operations agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential transaction management focus
General document management without real estate transaction workflows
Property management without real estate sales transaction compliance
best_when: A real estate brokerage, team, or agent using Dotloop wants AI agents to automate transaction coordination, document collection, e-signature workflows, and compliance reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Real estate transaction documents include sensitive financial and personal data. Purchase agreements and disclosures contain personal financial information. E-signature workflows must maintain legal document integrity. Automated document generation must comply with state real estate disclosure laws.

auth.notes: Dotloop uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. User and team-level credentials with loop, document, and profile scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Acquired by Zillow Group 2015. Partner program for CRM and MLS integrations. Webhooks for real-time document and loop events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Basic loop creation free for agents; premium features require subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user and per-team pricing; enterprise brokerage pricing
pricing.notes: Cincinnati, Ohio. Founded 2009. Acquired by Zillow Group 2015. Major real estate transaction platform. Used by 500,000+ real estate professionals. Competes with SkySlope and Lone Wolf for transaction management. Strong NAR relationship. Integration with Zillow ecosystem.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Real estate transaction documents contain sensitive financial and personal data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Zillow Group parent — data may be shared with Zillow ecosystem partners
E-signature legal validity — document modifications after signing break legal binding
State-specific disclosure requirements — automated disclosure generation needs state law compliance
Loop sharing access controls — not all parties to a transaction have equal document access rights
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate transaction documents with financial PII. SOC2. OAuth2 scoped. US data residency. Zillow parent company data sharing considerations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate transaction data with financial PII. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Zillow ecosystem considerations.
